title: Servitude of view.
doc_html:
Art. 701.  Servitude of view.

The servitude of view is the right by which the owner of the dominant estate enjoys a view; this includes the right to prevent the raising of constructions on the servient estate that would obstruct the view.

Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
